creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
When was the incident? 

log/messages shows ---<<BOOT>>--- on five occasions.

(In reply to john from comment #0)

> an upstream bug 

Was a reference number given? 

Any other context; if there was discussion in a forum, can you provide a link?


Side note
=========

>> … FreeBSD 12.2-RELEASE-p11 75566f060d4(HEAD) TRUENAS amd64

<https://www.freebsd.org/security/#sup> there's expected end of life within five weeks.
